response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, experienced full-stack engineer with strong testing culture and open-source contributions, but he does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. His professional C++ experience is roughly one year (National Instruments, 2007-2008) against a hard requirement of 8 years, and his large-scale infrastructure exposure is limited to about two years at Sociomantic plus hobby-scale Kubernetes deployments, versus the 5 years required. His career centers on web, mobile, and product development in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang rather than cloud compute platforms, and he shows no formal technical-leadership experience mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers at production scale.
strengths: Long, broad engineering career (25+ years) spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Genuine low-latency distributed-systems experience at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec, async I/O, caching)
Strong mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record through workshops, courses, and coding dojos
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement (~1 year professional C++, mostly in 2007-2008)
Limited large-scale infrastructure and production cloud architecture experience for a compute-platform lead role
No formal technical-leadership role leading strategy or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers across teams

key_factors.factor: Breadth, testing rigor, and mentoring aptitude
